rulings.Case Title: MAX SHIRRY-WYSS VS. NOB HILL PLACE PARTNERS LP ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 9, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT NOB HILL PLACE PARTNERS LP Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement is CONTINUED to March 18, 2020. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. MEI LING FANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Third Party Mark Laphams Compliance With Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 9, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF CHARLES LI Motion To Compel Third Party Mark Laphams Compliance With Subpoena is GRANTED. Third Party Mark Lapham shall appear for deposition within three weeks of notice of this Order. Plaintiff demonstrated that Mr. Lapham has personal knowledge of the subject matter of this lawsuit. However, the Court makes no rulings on whether Mr. Lapham's testimony or the documents requested are protected from disclosure by the attorney-client privilege or any other privilege. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is DENIED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA JONES VS. THE ESTATE OF JOSIE STAMPS, ET AL.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 9, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT SCOTT HENDLER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to March 25, 2020. Defendant to comply with Local Rule 2.7(B) by providing courtesy copies of the moving papers to the Court by March 13, 2020. =(501/REQ)
